channel.title: ace seq2seq on yizengli.com
channel.description: Recent content in ace seq2seq on yizengli.com

item.title: GAN, Explained - Part 1
item.description: In GAN, generator and discriminator work together in generation tasks. But do we really need the discriminator considering the existence of generation models like VAE.

item.title: Word2vec, Explained - Part 1
item.description: A tutorial, focused on Skip-Gram, for Word2vec with statistical details explained.
